data.content: Implementation review rejected: the required multi-model scan flow is not covered by a valid end-to-end check. scripts/test-copilot-settings-ui.mjs still drives a single Add click and waits for a removed 'registered' marker, and scripts/test-fixtures/fake-copilot.sh does not expose multiple scan models via 'copilot help config'. The current unit tests are markup-only and do not verify multi-add persistence or zero-selection cancel behavior.
